title: Osbeckia excelsa

This family consists of approximately 160 genera and 5,000 species, with Osbeckia excelsa being one of the species within it. The genus Osbeckia, to which Osbeckia excelsa belongs, is native to tropical Asia and consists of several species. The classification of Osbeckia excelsa within the family Melastomataceae and the genus Osbeckia is based on its morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics.
